Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Directly supports Target 16.6 ('Develop effective, accountable and transparent institutions') by teaching risk management, a cornerstone of stable and well-governed financial institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course content on managing interest rate, foreign exchange, and market risk is fundamental to Target 17.13 ('Enhance global macroeconomic stability').
